name: cloud ADR: records the decision outcome and rationale
command:
bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/cloud-adr.sh" --title "Zero Trust mesh" --slug zero-trust-mesh --seq 7 --pillar security --decision "mTLS per service" --options "VPN, mesh, hybrid" --rationale "least privilege" --out-dir adr --now 2026-06-08T12:00:00Z 2>/dev/null
grep -q 'Chosen: mTLS per service' adr/0007-zero-trust-mesh.md && grep -q 'least privilege' adr/0007-zero-trust-mesh.md && echo outcome 1>&2
